name: Ginger Basted Pineapple and Pepper Skewers
recipeIngredient: 1 large ripe pineapple, peeled and cut into good-sized chunks
1 green pepper, seeded, cut into big chunks
1 red pepper, seeded, cut into big chunks
8 small pieces preserved sugared ginger, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Thread the pineapple and peppers onto metal or soaked bamboo skewers.
2. Combine the ginger with the butter and red pepper flakes to create a basting mixture.
3. Brush the basting mixture onto the kebabs.
4. Grill over a not-too-hot fire, turning frequently and basting once or twice, until lightly browned. This should take 7 to 10 minutes.
5. Serve for 4 to 6 people.
PER SERVING: 125 calories, 1 g protein, 18 g carbohydrate, 6 g fat (4 g saturated), 15 mg cholesterol, 50 mg sodium, 2 g fiber.
